title: Old Dog, New Tricks: How RuneScape Stays Relevant in a Modern Era
description: Whether RuneScape is truly charming or just nostalgia is hard to say, but its recent updates, RuneLite plugins, and popularity speak for themselves.

title: My AI is Bigger Than Yours
description: Will we lose a generation of would-be experts to the belief that robots are 'good enough' at most tasks?

title: Simple Image Optimization Tips for Faster Websites
description: Caching is great, but unoptimized images can still hurt load times. Use free tools to compress images and html tricks for speed and accessibility.

title: Learning GO as a Noob
description: Transitioning from Java's verbosity to Go has been surprisingly smooth, but now I want to move past the syntax and dive into lower-level complexities.

title: Learning Game Development as a Noob
description: Exploring the itch to truly understand how games work but not knowing where to go yet. A look at my experiences, mistakes, and plan going forward.
